findings.detail: Source-level pre-flight: 6 nodes (within 3-8), all labels ≤4 words in bold, title governs whole diagram via config block, 3-panel LR layout with direction TB subgraphs matches intent. All node labels trace to corpus §5.3 concepts (same direction → high positive, opposite → negative, perpendicular → zero). No jargon, no concept drift. PNG render requires mmdc CLI — no shell tool available in this session; visual inspection bypassed.
